transform.csv.description: Converts items to CSV or parses CSV into items.
transform.spreadsheet.description: Reads an Excel/CSV file; each row becomes an item.
transform.htmlExtract.description: Extracts values from HTML using CSS selectors.
transform.xmlJson.description: Converts XML to JSON or JSON to XML.
transform.htmlToText.description: Converts HTML to plain text or Markdown.
split.out.description: Splits an array field into separate items.
